intent_tree: {"处理一个mp3文件，包括查找、质量确认和杂音检测": {"找到指定的mp3文件": {}, "确认音频质量是否清楚": {"分析音频的基本参数（时长、振幅、能量）": {}, "绘制波形图以可视化音频内容": {}}, "处理不清楚的音频": {"降噪处理": {}, "音量标准化": {}, "智能增益调整": {}}, "检测音频中的杂音": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "搜索当前目录及其子目录下的MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载选定的MP3文件并提取音频样本数据"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "计算音频的基本参数（时长、最大振幅、RMS能量）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "绘制音频波形图以帮助可视化分析"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "根据RMS能量和最大振幅评估音频质量"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "执行降噪处理（使用noisereduce库）"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "对音频进行音量标准化处理"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "调整音频增益至目标级别（-20 dBFS）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "保存处理后的音频文件到本地"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "fileSelection"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "dataExtraction"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "qualityAssessment"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "visualization"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "noiseReductionTrigger"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "normalization"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "gainAdjustment"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "saveFile"}]}
